name: gate-priority-not-registered-outranks-mismatch
description: A single push that references BOTH an unknown export (`useDoorDashCheckout` under `@acme/checkout`) AND a package-mismatched export (`useLeafletMap` under `@acme/maps`, registered only under `@ggui-samples/leaflet`). The gate classifies every miss and MUST throw the most-fundamental category FIRST — `gadget_not_registered` outranks `gadget_package_mismatch`, because an author who got the export name wrong cannot act on a 'wrong package' message. The lower-priority package miss rides the rejection's `secondary` so the author corrects both in one round trip; the catalog asserts the primary outcome code.
